textByHashes.1dbf59ee57633e3232997feeaa9e882c627a4879: Look, I don't have time for weaklings, if you want conversation, talk to my brother Blanin!
textByHashes.afc5412832766a192f373d9597cf453501765f35: But how do you know me?
textByHashes.b6f420b164bdfc5ab967aa35adc15bff18a0528e: Don't talk of my brother. He's not on my good side at the moment.
textByHashes.02eec8645ef3bb909c477e69caca877ff6882660: If so, what weapon do I use?
textByHashes.aaf304b5f0d6f53729b62796881a4a3aeac96511: When do I like to eat rats?
textByHashes.42fceb663a5a40aa4655fab27e543b3d038435a9: What do I usually eat for tea?
textByHashes.36440299d836e112e88755faf392a51eb3c54d34: What colour spider blood tastes the best?
textByHashes.49d205580200f33476ee6ca6a7284ac255fd688d: How many years old am I?
textByHashes.5a9bce7395a6ecc71e689ebeee424377e500f08a: What are the most interesting ages for battles?
textByHashes.ac04174f741ebc7cbc6f0a615671bdc9563ecf51: And my house is situated where?
textByHashes.c97f1676599ac9f4d7242519b7f0360f2bd0c492: And my pet cat is called?
textByHashes.b4bf438837f2565a144a507deff5adba28f7297c: Very well, you seem to know me quite well, I'll answer your questions best I can.
textByHashes.4467f67e1c569e8a7c72a91aed6de931e08deec9: Let me see. Ah yes, I remember reading of a battle that took place at the outpost many years ago. Two ex- friends led forces in a small battle that ended with them pitted against each other at the top of the outpost as the
textByHashes.438b3c909e3a39f898aa156236705751f76df6db: sole survivors because of their superior strength.
textByHashes.62a80d67d05f53640d92229cd3752428a94796ca: They were once friends but a difference in their beliefs meant they fell out. One chose to follow the god Zamorak, whilst the other chose Saradomin. But finding themselves in this extreme situation at the top of the
textByHashes.50c85f8a5dad77a45d2c2c2671b5ac86b8ab8834: outpost caused them to see the errors of their ways, like the waste of life, the lost friendship and the wasted time. They both then decided to unite under Guthix.
textByHashes.be580d7e986585d8fc154f6bc1f5715863753b8d: What a strange name. Unlike my brothers!
textByHashes.79505035e23975f6f74cbe3ece766376d9c3a37f: Eww. Gross. You have some strange tastes.
textByHashes.122976f2913d7b3972ba86f9359888e33d655997: Leave me or I'll destroy you!
textByHashes.dae9bf564cb9789ffaa241f5c33a436bd4a9b5f5: You have your answers, now go away!
